caseStudy.services: Brand Guidelines, Visual Strategy, Typography System
caseStudy.challenge: The client, THS, needed a cohesive, professional, and visually striking strategy to establish brand trust in their industry. The existing visuals lacked coordination, creating friction for new customer acquisitions and brand recognition.
caseStudy.solution: We designed a unified design system that centers around custom-tailored visual assets. This system provides clear guidelines for typography hierarchy, a structured brand color palette, and high-fidelity layouts across all digital and print touchpoints, allowing THS to communicate premium quality at a glance.
caseStudy.results: Following the launch of the new identity system, THS experienced a significant increase in client trust, a unified presentation across their team, and a highly polished professional footprint that sets them apart from competitors.
